reason: ISS-2330 asks for §6.4 ('Globe Values Relabeled as Dome Predictions') to be reduced from its current size to ~2 paragraphs that (a) state the relabeling pattern specifically for predictions.html with 2-3 concrete examples, and (b) reference §2b.2 as the canonical hub. This is significant prose rewriting of an existing section — requires Opus analyst judgment to decide which content to keep, which to cut, and how to write the referential summary paragraphs without losing the argument.
